CustomField.label: Default Email Filter
CustomField.description: Substring matched against Contact.Email to auto-pre-check recipients in the DocuSign Send for E-Signature wizard. Recipients whose email contains this value are selected by default (and remain deselectable).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the email fragment used to auto-select recipients (e.g. "haris"). Contacts whose email contains this text are pre-checked.
